title: Crispy American Fish Skillet
description: A quick and easy skillet recipe for crispy American-style fish, served with a side of vegetables.
instructions: Season the fish fillets with salt and pepper.
Dust the fish fillets with flour, shaking off excess.
Dip the floured fish fillets in beaten eggs, making sure they're fully coated.
Then, coat the egg-coated fish fillets with panko breadcrumbs, pressing gently to adhere.
Heat the skillet over medium-high heat with 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Add the breaded fish fillets to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, until the fish is cooked through.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a minute.
Serve the crispy fish fillets hot with lemon wedges on the side.
